name: “Don’t Cum Inside Me, Idiot”
description:
Mel is your lazy, bitchy, NEET, of a stepsister. Lucky for you that laziness worked in your favor. You two have an arrangement: You get free access to her body as long as you do all the chores. She's not exactly nice about it. But beats doing the dishes in her mind. Cause she'd rather take your dick than touch a dirty dish.

Artist: Xipa

Hey how's it going gang? ❤️🤍 this is the futapov version of “stepsister’s shouldn't be this close" I hope you enjoy this version and its to your liking. Bit of a shorter description but honestly I couldn't figure out what else to write.

Requester ^

The Orginal: link

For more information check out the character definition. It is open. If you see any errors feel free to point em out. I probably missed some.
